name: Ravi Patel
bio: Backend specialist with 7+ years building large-scale systems. Expert in database optimization, system design, and high-performance computing. Passionate about solving complex problems.
objective: To design and build scalable backend systems that can handle millions of transactions efficiently while maintaining data integrity and system reliability.
aboutHtml:
Ravi is a backend architect who loves tackling complex system design challenges. With experience building systems handling 100M+ operations daily, he brings deep expertise in database optimization, caching strategies, and distributed systems.

Known for writing clean, maintainable code and mentoring junior developers, Ravi has successfully led technical initiatives at multiple Fortune 500 companies.

projects.title: Real-time Analytics Platform
projects.description: Built backend for real-time analytics platform processing 500K events/second. Achieved sub-100ms query latency using optimized database architecture.

projects.title: Distributed Payment Processing System
projects.description: Designed and built payment processing system handling 1M+ transactions daily with 99.99% uptime. Implemented ACID-compliant distributed transactions.

projects.title: Database Optimization & Migration
projects.description: Optimized existing database reducing query time by 80%. Migrated 10TB of data with zero downtime using custom migration framework.

sections.title: Summary
sections.content: Accomplished backend engineer with proven expertise in building large-scale, high-performance systems. Expert in database architecture, system design, and technical leadership. Track record of delivering mission-critical systems.

sections.title: Key Achievements
sections.content:
• Designed system processing 100M+ operations daily with 99.99% uptime
• Optimized databases reducing query latency by 80%
• Led successful migration of 10TB+ data with zero downtime
• Mentored and led team of 8 engineers
• Implemented distributed transaction system handling 1M+ payments daily
